STEPS TO FOLLOW 

1- Clone the repository 

git clone https://github.com/jfzhang95/pytorch-deeplab-xception.git
cd pytorch-deeplab-xception

2- Download Pre-trained model resnet.

3- Open the folder with VC.

4- Add segmentation.py

Then segmentation.py should be in the same level as modeling 

pytorch-deeplab-xception/
│
├── modeling/
│   └── deeplab.py   ← AQUÍ está la clase DeepLab
├── dataloaders/
├── segmentation.py
